{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Eithan's Path
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] has a [[Path]] that he did not want [[Lindon]] to adopt.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan's Path]] does not have a full-body [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
